prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: I purchased the "Waking Up" experience and was underwhelmed by the overall product. Upon opening my eyes, I was greeted by a bright light that felt somewhat jarring, and the accompanying sense of awareness was somewhat underwhelming. The transition from a state of unconsciousness to consciousness was abrupt and lacked any sort of fanfare or notification. The product's "features" included a mild sense of disorientation, a moderate level of grogginess, and a vague recollection of previous dreams. While the product did deliver on its promise of "getting me out of bed eventually," the overall experience felt somewhat unremarkable and lacking in value. Would not repurchase, but will likely continue to receive this product involuntarily as part of my daily routine. 2/5 stars.
